final:
module top_module(
	input clk,
	input MemtoReg,
	input [31:0] in0,
	input [31:0] in1,
	output wire[31:0] out
);assign out = MemtoReg ? in1 : in0;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (MemtoReg) begin
        out <= in0;
      end else begin
        out <= in1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
